testsuite.name: com.walter.datamaskingdemo.AdminRoleTest
testsuite.system-out:
=== ADMIN USER (kiivindu) === Current user roles: [ROLE_ADMIN]
User 1 (Bret) - ADMIN should see all data: Original: User[id=1, name=Leanne Graham, username=Bret, email=Sincere@april.biz, address=Address[street=Kulas Light, suite=Apt. 556, city=Gwenborough, zipcode=92998-3874, geo=Geo[lat=-37.3159, lng=81.1496]], phone=1-770-736-8031 x56442, website=hildegard.org, company=Company[name=Romaguera-Crona, catchPhrase=Multi-layered client-server neural-net, bs=harness real-time e-markets]] Masked: User[id=1, name=Leanne Graham, username=Bret, email=Sincere@april.biz, address=Address[street=Kulas Light, suite=Apt. 556, city=Gwenborough, zipcode=*********4, geo=Geo[lat=-37.3159, lng=81.-496]], phone=1-7**************6442, website=hildegard.org, company=Company[name=Romaguera-Crona, catchPhrase=Multi-layered client-server neural-net, bs=harness real-time e-markets]]
User 2 (Antonette) - ADMIN should see all data: Original: User[id=2, name=Ervin Howell, username=Antonette, email=Shanna@melissa.tv, address=Address[street=Victor Plains, suite=Suite 879, city=Wisokyburgh, zipcode=90566-7771, geo=Geo[lat=-43.9509, lng=-34.4618]], phone=010-692-6593 x09125, website=anastasia.net, company=Company[name=Deckow-Crist, catchPhrase=Proactive didactic contingency, bs=synergize scalable supply-chains]] Masked: User[id=2, name=Ervin Howell, username=Antonette, email=Shanna@melissa.tv, address=Address[street=Victor Plains, suite=Suite 879, city=Wisokyburgh, zipcode=*********1, geo=Geo[lat=-43.9509, lng=-34--618]], phone=010************9125, website=anastasia.net, company=Company[name=Deckow-Crist, catchPhrase=Proactive didactic contingency, bs=synergize scalable supply-chains]]
=== VERIFICATION === User 1 email visible: Sincere@april.biz User 1 phone masked: 1-7**************6442 User 1 zipcode masked: *********4 User 1 longitude masked: 81.-496
User 2 email visible: Shanna@melissa.tv User 2 phone masked: 010************9125 User 2 zipcode masked: *********1 User 2 longitude masked: -34--618 === REGULAR USER (regularuser) === Current user roles: [ROLE_USER]
